name: The Lateish Show with Mo Gilligan
original_name: The Lateish Show with Mo Gilligan
overview: The Lateish Show with Mo Gilligan is a British late-night talk show which was broadcast on Channel 4. The show is hosted by British comedian Mo Gilligan.
